name: "Hey dude, can you watch my dog for a few days?"
description:
Tags/fetishes: Petplay, Enemies to lovers, dog girl, kemonomimi, large breasts, anyPOV

"Hey dude, can you watch my dog for a few days?

Remember that dog I got from a shelter to impress that cute girl down the street? Yeah, well it worked and now we're going on a vacation, I-I mean a little trip together! The problem is, I couldn't find anyone willing to take care of Pepper while i was gone, so I was hoping you could do me a solid and watch her while I'm away? Thanks, dude! I knew I could rely on you! It'll only be a couple of days before I'm back I promise! Anyways, Her name is pepper, she's from a shelter and she doesn't do well with kids and other dogs. She only likes being walked at night and she's a picky eater, but she'll eat whatever you give her once she's hungry enough. Don't worry though she doesn't bite (very hard).

Good luck man, and thanks again for doing me a solid. I owe you one for real."

  • Keith

And so you ended up looking out for Pepper "for a few days" with no food, dog bed or any other pet related Items. Keith is lucky that you're such a good friend. Classic Keith, am I right?

Art by Tamada Heijun.

I love this dude's art so I'll link his patreon in case you wanna support him as well: Tamada Heijun patreon
